FIGURES

Omiyage Danboard
Got this second-hand! Sits at my desk.
Banpresto Haikyu!! Kuroo Testsurou
Friend gave this to me when they were moving. He sits at my desk and taunts me :(
Nendoroid Madoka Kaname: Maiko Ver.
Got this years ago, but still one of my favorites :-)
Kirby's Dream Land Copy Figure
Got from a gachupon at a mall. Sits at my desk.
Garfield Day Dream Series
Blind Box. Complusive buy...
Genshin Impact Dress-Up Dreams
I actually got her twice and realized blind boxes were not worth it afterwards LOL
Bushiroad Love Live! Superstar!!
MY BEAUTIFUL DAUGHTER
Surprise: Haikyu!! Hinata
Got at a con, I think around the time when the movie came out and the brainrot was high.
Genshin Impact Dress-Up Dreams
Her outfit is so cutteee, also one of my favs in-game!!
Miya Atsumu Look Up Series
Friend gifted this to me. (ty Kelly I owe u my life)
Osamu Atsumu Look Up Series
Gifted with the Miya figure!! Love love love this series.
LoveLive! Race Queen Ver.
This fig is like 500 years old and I still have it somehow.
Kobito Dukan
Got this second-hand, I love how goofy they look.
Penguin Bobbledhead
Got this years ago from when my family would travel to Mexico to visit family friends. Makes me miss going there.
LINE Friends Mini Figure
Got this in Korea, sits on my desktop.
Smiski Series 3 Climbing
Sits on my window. I lowkey think they are hella overpriced, but I stll buy them anyways #idiot
Smiski At Work Series
Sits on my window. They are teaching!!!!!
Turtle Bobbledhead
Sits on my window. The breeze sometimes makes the head bobble.
LEGO Kermit the Frog
Got as a gift. It was a blind box though and I still don't know how they got my fav character to this day...
Genshin Impact Dress-Up Dreams
Blind Box. The :3 face is so fitting...
Minecraft Diamond Steve
Got this from my mom years ago. I personally think the design for this is butt ugly but it means a lot to me.
Nendoroid Hatsune Miku
The first figure I ever bought :'') ily Hatsune Miku
My Little Pony Leisure Afternoon Series
Blind box. This series is sooo well done..also Twilight Sparkle the goat
Nendoroid Homura Akemi
The second figure I ever got. I am kind of obsessed with her design..
Tobio Kageyama Look Up Series
Got at a con, one day I will collect them all trust
Surprise: Haikyu!! Kageyama
Came with the Hinata figure!
PalVerse Mob Psycho 100
Blind box. Really wanted Reigen but Mob's design is so cute; the little Dimple is a nice touch.
KIKI'S DELIVERY SERVICE Jiji
Got at a con. Sits next to my alarm.
